Right hand pressing MUZGAE MANSION lip tint bottle against lower cheek and chin, fingers wrapped around bottle, colorful pink nail art with white floral details visible on nails. Black outfit with white collar detail at neckline. Do not smooth skin. Label must be fully legible. Preserve exact facial structure, proportions, and identity. No beauty filter. Do not reshape body proportions.
